hero.title: Keep your 2nd-Brain unlimited
hero.subtitle: Your records stay available on Free. Add more AI when you want it.
hero.speech: The core stays free. Plus just adds more room to think together.

comingSoonBody: You will see Plus here when it is ready. No charge until you choose it.

free.name: Free
free.f2: Private account storage with export when you need it

plus.name: Plus
plus.tagline: More room to think with AI
